evidence_rea: Your data is not used by any other parties or shared with third parties.
evidence_reg: the data subject shall have the right to obtain from the controller confirmation as to whether or not personal data concerning him or her are being processed
(c) the recipients or categories of recipient to whom the personal data have been
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA states a substantive non-sharing/use claim, while the REG grants a right to obtain information about processing and recipients; these do not clearly express the same or directly conflicting constraint.

evidence_rea: Your data is not used by any other parties or shared with third parties.
evidence_reg: The Controller SHALL provide the data subject with all of the following information at the time when personal data are obtained.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA makes a claim about non-use/non-sharing by third parties, whereas the REG imposes an information-provision duty at collection; there is no quote-supported same or directly conflicting constraint.

evidence_rea: Your data is not used by any other parties or shared with third parties.
evidence_reg: Paragraph 1 shall not apply if one of the following applies: (e) processing relates to personal data which are manifestly made public by the data subject;
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA concerns sharing/use by other parties or third parties, while the REG is an exception clause about when a separate prohibition does not apply; the texts do not clearly impose the same or conflicting rule.
